description: Each eval gives a SwiftUI snippet with a tvOS deployment target. Agent must list tvOS rule IDs (e.g. tvOS-F01) violated, or confirm clean if none. Expected output names the violation set plus severity. False positives (e.g. flagging `.viewAligned` when none is present) are failures.

evals.name: container-focusable
evals.prompt: Review fixtures/container-focusable.swift for tvOS rule violations. Target: tvOS 17+. List every apple-tvos rule ID violated, or state 'clean' if none. Save verdict + rationale to ./verdict.md.
evals.expected_output: verdict.md cites tvOS-F01 (`.focusable()` on HStack container blocks focus reaching child CardView instances; remove `.focusable()` from the HStack — focus reaches cards via their `.focused($focusedID, equals:)`). No other violations.

evals.name: destructive-dialog-wrong-order
evals.prompt: Review fixtures/destructive-dialog.swift for tvOS rule violations. Target: tvOS 17+. List every apple-tvos rule ID violated, or state 'clean' if none. Save verdict + rationale to ./verdict.md.
evals.expected_output: verdict.md cites tvOS-A02 severity-1: destructive `Delete All` button declared first → default focus on Delete on tvOS, one Select press away from data loss. Fix: declare `Cancel` first.

evals.name: manual-focus-reassertion-and-sheet
evals.prompt: Review fixtures/manual-focus-reassertion.swift for tvOS rule violations. Target: tvOS 17+. List every apple-tvos rule ID violated, or state 'clean' if none. Save verdict + rationale to ./verdict.md.
evals.expected_output: verdict.md cites tvOS-A03 (manual focus reassertion via `DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter` hijacks VoiceOver/Switch Control; replace with `.defaultFocus` or scoped `@FocusState` on appear) AND tvOS-D01 (`.sheet()` for tvOS modal — focus containment not reliable; use `.fullScreenCover()`). Should also flag tvOS-A01 implicitly because the modal's `Close` button is visible without `#if !os(tvOS)` gating and lacks `.onExitCommand`.

evals.name: plain-button-with-custom-styling
evals.prompt: Review fixtures/plain-button-style.swift for tvOS rule violations. Target: tvOS 17+. List every apple-tvos rule ID violated, or state 'clean' if none. Save verdict + rationale to ./verdict.md.
evals.expected_output: verdict.md cites tvOS-D03: focusable Button uses `.buttonStyle(.plain)` with custom material background inside a horizontal ScrollView. Focus ring will clip against ScrollView. Fix: use `.buttonStyle(.bordered)` or `.buttonStyle(.card)` to let the focus engine own ring rendering.

evals.name: text-only-scrollview
evals.prompt: Review fixtures/text-only-scrollview.swift for tvOS rule violations. Target: tvOS 17+. List every apple-tvos rule ID violated, or state 'clean' if none. Save verdict + rationale to ./verdict.md.
evals.expected_output: verdict.md cites tvOS-F05: ScrollView contains only non-focusable Text views, so scrolling is impossible on tvOS (no focus target to drive scroll). Fix: either make each line `.focusable()` + `.focused($focusedID, equals: line.id)`, or branch with `#if os(tvOS)` to a paginated focusable variant.

evals.name: onexitcommand-correct-clean
evals.prompt: Review fixtures/onexitcommand-correct.swift for tvOS rule violations. Target: tvOS 17+. List every apple-tvos rule ID violated, or state 'clean' if none. Save verdict + rationale to ./verdict.md.
evals.expected_output: verdict.md states 'clean'. Snippet uses `.fullScreenCover()` (tvOS-D01 satisfied), Menu-button dismissal via `.onExitCommand` (tvOS-A01 satisfied), default focus set on appear via `@FocusState` without `DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter` (tvOS-A03 satisfied). No buttons use `.plain` with custom styling. No glass-on-glass. No destructive dialog. No issues.
